description:
Legal record (#32) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 8r-v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 1 Nisan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #32) Real estate purchase by Ḥabība, widow of Moshe Jawwānī, and her mother-in-law Simḥa bt. Shelomo ha-Levi Kātib, acting as guardians on behalf of their children/grandchildren Yaʿaqov and Esther. The property's location on Darb Wālī al-Walāʾ known as Darb al-Lawlawīya(?). Most of the entry recounts the succession of previous owners/purchases leading up to the property sale by Yisraʾel Ashkenazi to the minors Yaʿaqov and Esther, who are represented by their mother and their paternal grandmother. The guardians of the children purchase the property for 7,500 medin. Ḥabība also appears in the previous five entries of the same court register (documents #27-31). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
